description: Backend database layer (migrations, queries, seed) and background job workers (BullMQ queues and workers)

nodes.label: migration-runner.ts
nodes.description: Migration runner — reads .sql files from migrations/ dir, tracks applied migrations in _migrations table, applies pending ones in transaction with hash-based change detection

nodes.label: DatabaseMigrations (31 files)
nodes.description: Sequential SQL migration files (001-031) that build the full eFPS schema from core tables through enterprise ERP redesign

nodes.label: 001_init_tables.sql
nodes.description: Core schema: dealers, beneficiaries, stock_allocations, transactions — the 4 primary entities of the FPS domain

nodes.label: 002_add_sessions.sql
nodes.description: Sessions table for dealer auth with refresh token hashing

nodes.label: 003_add_otp.sql
nodes.description: OTP requests table for mobile-based authentication flows

nodes.label: 004_add_audit_log.sql
nodes.description: Audit logs table tracking user actions on entities

nodes.label: 005_add_notifications.sql
nodes.description: Notifications table for in-app dealer alerts

nodes.label: 006_inventory_movements.sql
nodes.description: Inventory movements table tracking stock in/out

nodes.label: 007_add_commissions.sql
nodes.description: Commission engine: commission_rates, commissions, bank_settlements — dealer commission calculation with TDS

nodes.label: 008_add_finance.sql
nodes.description: Finance tables: income_entries, expense_entries for dealer P&L

nodes.label: 009_add_ads.sql
nodes.description: Advertisement/circular display tables for dealer dashboard

nodes.label: 010_add_mdm.sql
nodes.description: Mid-Day Meal tables: MDM allocations, distributions, stock tracking

nodes.label: 011_add_sync_logs.sql
nodes.description: Sync logs tracking all government data import/export operations

nodes.label: 012_add_social_audit.sql
nodes.description: Social audit tables for IPDS portal scraped data

nodes.label: 013_add_missing_tables.sql
nodes.description: Adds missing tables identified during integration testing

nodes.label: 014_add_views.sql
nodes.description: Materialized/reporting views for dealer dashboards and analytics

nodes.label: 015_add_govt_sync_enhancements.sql
nodes.description: Govt PDS sync: extends beneficiaries with portal fields, adds govt_beneficiary_imports, govt_change_log, sync_scheduler_config, sync_import_batches

nodes.label: 016_add_gujarat_hierarchy.sql
nodes.description: Gujarat admin hierarchy: districts, talukas, villages reference data

nodes.label: 017_add_dealer_credentials.sql
nodes.description: Dealer credentials table storing encrypted portal login info

nodes.label: 018_add_sync_jobs.sql
nodes.description: Sync jobs table tracking individual sync operation lifecycle

nodes.label: 019_add_composite_indexes.sql
nodes.description: Composite indexes for query performance optimization

nodes.label: 020_add_mdm_monthly_records.sql
nodes.description: MDM monthly record tables for school-level nutrition tracking

nodes.label: 021_add_dealer_credential_iv_password.sql
nodes.description: Adds separate IV/password columns for credential encryption upgrade

nodes.label: 022_add_sync_scheduler_source_url.sql
nodes.description: Adds source_url to sync_scheduler_config for per-dealer portal URL

nodes.label: 023_add_tds_rates.sql
nodes.description: TDS rates table for per-commodity tax deduction configuration

nodes.label: 024_add_on_delete_cascade.sql
nodes.description: Adds ON DELETE CASCADE to existing FK relationships for referential integrity

nodes.label: 025_add_updated_at_trigger.sql
nodes.description: Auto-update trigger function for updated_at columns across tables

nodes.label: 026_enterprise_sync_infrastructure.sql
nodes.description: Enterprise sync: sync_jobs enhancements, sync_quarantine, system_events, service_tokens, scheduler config columns

nodes.label: 027_auth_refresh_optimization.sql
nodes.description: Auth refresh token optimization and index improvements

nodes.label: 028_add_commission_payments.sql
nodes.description: Commission payments table for tracking actual disbursements to dealers

nodes.label: 029_add_sync_columns.sql
nodes.description: Adds sync-related columns (source_synced_at, sync_job_id, version) to domain tables

nodes.label: 030_create_stock_entry_system.sql
nodes.description: Stock entry system: stock_entries (government qty vs received/damaged) and per-beneficiary allocations table

nodes.label: 031_enterprise_erp_redesign.sql
nodes.description: Major ERP redesign resolving 4 architectural conflicts: transaction_source enum to prevent double-deductions, inventory_department (REGULAR_FPS/MDM/ICDS), items + stock_ledger + stock_ledger_movements, transaction_line_items with temporal pricing snapshot, financial_ledger separating physical from financial, auto-triggers for stock/financial posting, vw_stock_ledger_rolling and vw_financial_summary views

nodes.label: queries/index.ts (MISSING FROM DISK — empty queries/ dir)
nodes.description: Barrel export for all query modules — directory is empty on disk, likely planned re-export point for beneficiary.queries, dealer.queries, transaction.queries, report.queries

nodes.label: beneficiary.queries.ts (MISSING FROM DISK)
nodes.description: Beneficiary database query functions (CRUD, search, bulk operations) — does not exist on disk

nodes.label: dealer.queries.ts (MISSING FROM DISK)
nodes.description: Dealer database query functions (CRUD, auth lookups, sync config) — does not exist on disk

nodes.label: transaction.queries.ts (MISSING FROM DISK)
nodes.description: Transaction database query functions (CRUD, aggregations, monthly summaries) — does not exist on disk

nodes.label: report.queries.ts (MISSING FROM DISK)
nodes.description: Report/analytics query functions (dashboard aggregations, financial reports) — does not exist on disk

nodes.label: seed.ts (MISSING FROM DISK — empty seeds/ dir)
nodes.description: Database seeder for development/test data — directory is empty on disk, does not exist

nodes.label: audit-flush.job.ts
nodes.description: BullMQ queue + worker for async audit log flushing — accepts AuditFlushPayload, inserts into audit_logs table

nodes.label: daily-report.job.ts
nodes.description: BullMQ queue + worker for daily dealer reports — aggregates transactions, counts pending beneficiaries, generates summary notification (scheduled at 22:00 daily)

nodes.label: domain-events.queue.ts
nodes.description: BullMQ queue + worker for domain event processing — handles TRANSACTION_COMPLETED (commission calc + low stock alert), LIFTING_CREATED, COMMISSION_SETTLED (income entry), BENEFICIARY_CREATED, ALLOCATION_CREATED, SYNC_COMPLETED, STOCK_LOW, BENEFICIARY_UPDATED, ALLOCATION_UPDATED events; uses circuit-breaker patterns and Redis cache invalidation

nodes.label: session-cleanup.job.ts
nodes.description: BullMQ worker for periodic session cleanup — deletes expired sessions, marks expired OTPs, cleans stale Redis online_dealers set

nodes.label: sms-otp.job.ts
nodes.description: BullMQ queue + worker for SMS OTP delivery — supports mock (console) and MSG91 provider with circuit breaker for SMS API resilience; handles password_reset, verify_mobile, 2fa purposes

nodes.label: sync/sync-scheduler.job.ts
nodes.description: BullMQ queue + worker that checks sync_scheduler_config for pending syncs, creates sync_jobs records, and enqueues efps-sync workers with exponential backoff and jitter; processes up to 50 dealers per run

nodes.label: sync/ipds-sync.worker.ts
nodes.description: Playwright automation worker for IPDS (Gujarat PDS) social audit portal — decrypts dealer credentials, logs in via ASP.NET WebForms (with CAPTCHA solving via Tesseract OCR), scrapes social audit table data, posts to internal sync API; supports mock mode, circuit breaker, and sync_job lifecycle tracking

nodes.label: sync/govt-data-sync.job.ts
nodes.description: BullMQ queue + worker for government beneficiary data sync — fetches CSV/API data from govt portal, parses with CSV parser, imports via govtImporterService, marks deactivated beneficiaries, updates sync logs and scheduler config, emits SYNC_COMPLETED and BENEFICIARY_UPDATED domain events; supports full state and district-level sync orchestration

nodes.label: sync/efps-sync.worker.ts
nodes.description: Playwright automation worker for eFPS Gujarat portal — decrypts dealer credentials, solves CAPTCHA with Tesseract OCR, scrapes beneficiaries, transactions, and stock allocations from ASP.NET WebForms, maps to internal format, posts to internal sync API; supports full/incremental/priority sync modes, circuit breaker, and sync_job lifecycle tracking

nodes.label: jobs/index.ts (MISSING FROM DISK)
nodes.description: Barrel export for all job modules — does not exist on disk

nodes.label: jobs/queue-service.ts (MISSING FROM DISK)
nodes.description: Central queue service/manager for all BullMQ queues — does not exist on disk

nodes.label: DatabaseAccessLayer
nodes.description: The database layer: migration-runner applies 31 sequential SQL migrations; query modules (planned but not yet created in queries/ dir) would provide typed CRUD; seeds/ dir is empty

nodes.label: BackgroundJobSystem
nodes.description: BullMQ-based job system with 8 queues — each file defines a Queue + Worker pair. Workers are typed, use exponential backoff, and separate queue concerns: audit persistence, daily reporting, domain event processing, session/OTP maintenance, SMS notifications, sync scheduling, and government portal scraping (eFPS + IPDS)

nodes.label: GovernmentSyncPipeline
nodes.description: End-to-end sync pipeline: sync-scheduler polls sync_scheduler_config → creates sync_jobs → enqueues efps-sync or ipds-sync workers → Playwright scrapes govt portals → posts to internal sync API → govt-data-sync processes CSV/API imports → govtImporterService handles upsert → domain events emitted for notifications/dashboard cache invalidation

nodes.label: CommissionEngine
nodes.description: Commission calculation triggered by TRANSACTION_COMPLETED domain event — reads commission_rates and tds_rates per commodity, calculates gross/net with TDS deduction, upserts into commissions table with pending status

edges.label: applies sequentially
imports query/getClient from config/database.js
foundation tables: dealers, beneficiaries, stock_allocations, transactions
extends beneficiaries with govt portal fields
enhances sync_jobs with priority/mode/version/quarantine columns

adds transaction_source enum, source_file_id, upstream_hash to transactions
inserts into audit_logs table
uses getBullRedis for queue connection
aggregates transactions, counts beneficiaries, inserts notification
commission calc, stock queries, notifications inserts, income entries
clears dashboard:${dealerId} cache on data changes
imports EventTypes from event-bus.js
deletes expired sessions, marks expired OTPs
cleans stale online_dealers from Redis
reads SMS_PROVIDER, MSG91_AUTH_KEY, MSG91_* config
wraps MSG91 API calls in CircuitBreaker
queries sync_scheduler_config, creates sync_jobs, updates next_sync_at
calls enqueueEfpsSync() for each scheduled dealer
reads dealer_credentials, updates sync_jobs and sync_scheduler_config
decrypts IPDS credentials with decrypt()
emits SYNC_COMPLETED event
wraps IPDS portal scraping in CircuitBreaker
reads dealers, writes sync_logs and updates scheduler config
calls govtImporterService.importBeneficiaries() and markDeactivatedBeneficiaries()
emits SYNC_COMPLETED and BENEFICIARY_UPDATED events
reads dealer_credentials, updates sync_jobs, dealers, sync_scheduler_config
decrypts eFPS credentials with decrypt()
emits SYNC_COMPLETED event
wraps eFPS portal scraping in CircuitBreaker
enqueued by sync-scheduler; reports back via sync_job_id updates
sync pipeline is a subsystem of the job system
commission calculation runs inside domain-events worker on TRANSACTION_COMPLETED
